the elders come to know the real cause of the trouble being caused
by their children and guide them in proper path. Thus an
astrologer can be of yeoman service to the brethern of this world.
Some students have the tendency to rebuff when teacher
asks questions. Based only on that fact it should not be concluded
that the student is a bad one. Instead the student should be
properly advised, as such students are usually found to be very
intelligent. Some couple keep on quarrelling. They may even go
to the extent of divorce. Some native approach astrologers to find
out whether it would be better to divorce, and remarry. The
astrologer, after studying the horoscopes will be able to find (out
of the two persons) (i.e. husband or wife) who is more stubborn
and who is the quarrel-picker. Thus, the astrologer may be able
